title: Add product search bar to the Shop page

requirements.summary: Add a client-side search bar to the Shop page that filters the displayed product catalog in real time by product name or description, styled with the Lunara Jewels warm-tone theme.
acceptanceCriteria: A visible search input field appears above the product grid on the Shop page.
Typing in the search bar filters the product grid in real time to show only products whose name or description contains the search term (case-insensitive).
All 20 products are shown when the search input is empty or cleared.
When no products match, a friendly empty-state message is shown instead of an empty grid.
The search bar is styled with the existing Lunara Jewels warm-tone theme and does not use blue or purple as primary colors.
The search bar is responsive and does not break the layout on mobile viewports.
No backend changes are required; filtering operates entirely on the client-side product list.

file_operations.description: Add a controlled search input field above the product grid. Introduce local state to track the search query. Filter the products array returned by useProducts in real time using a case-insensitive substring match against product name and description. When the filtered array is empty, display a friendly empty-state message (e.g., 'No products found for your search. Try a different keyword or browse our full collection.'). Style the search input consistently with the Lunara Jewels warm-tone theme (no blue/purple primary colors). Ensure the search input and empty-state message are responsive on mobile viewports.
